subcategory: WebGL aurora shader background with ray marching
use_cases: Immersive hero section background for landing pages with animated aurora effects
Interactive visual backdrop for creative portfolios and media sites
Eye-catching animated background for SaaS marketing pages
Volumetric visual element for product showcases and demos
Responsive animated background component for web applications
ai_summary: An interactive WebGL shader component that renders a volumetric aurora borealis effect using ray marching and fractal Brownian motion (FBM). Features real-time animation with customizable flow speed, color intensity, noise layers, and mouse influence for interactive parallax effects. The component creates a visually stunning animated background suitable for hero sections, landing pages, or creative showcases, with smooth color gradients and ethereal lighting effects.
